full_text:
Shi Yi 士壹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Yi (士壹). Shi Xie’s brother. Served at the capital under Ding Gong, but later returned home. Shi Yi was affiliated with Shi Xie.
